title: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.90 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.86 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.70 per share a year ago.
